base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_number_score — a ui (hud_readout) from 1986 legend of zelda. HUD-specific 0-9 digits — used in rupee/bomb/key counters. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: HUD-specific 0-9 digits — used in rupee/bomb/key counters
